# Spec Summary (Lite)

Add a deterministic intelligence pipeline to AntarMind AI that automatically enriches every submitted thought with category tags (Trading, Work, Health, Learning, Personal, Stress, Ideas), sentiment classification (Positive/Negative/Neutral), and an intensity score — all using rule-based keyword matching with no external AI dependencies. The frontend thought list is updated to display tags and sentiment badges on each thought card.
